name: VIP
downloadable: none (trains on unlabeled Ego4D; releases encoder weights)
suitability: descriptive-only: produces a reward/representation model, no annotation corpus
focus_en: Learns a self-supervised goal-conditioned value function from unlabeled Ego4D video, providing dense visual rewards for unseen robot tasks.
focus_cn: 从无标注的 Ego4D 视频中自监督学习目标条件价值函数，为未见过的机器人任务提供稠密视觉奖励。
datapath_en: VIP consumes Ego4D egocentric video without using any action or language labels. It casts representation learning as offline goal-conditioned reinforcement learning and derives a self-supervised dual value-function objective (an implicit time-contrastive loss) trained over video frames. It releases pretrained visual-encoder weights that yield both a representation and a dense, smooth reward (the embedding distance to a goal image), not a new language-annotation corpus.
datapath_cn: VIP 使用 Ego4D 第一人称视频，但不依赖任何动作或语言标注。它将表征学习建模为离线目标条件强化学习，推导出一个在视频帧上训练的自监督对偶价值函数目标（隐式时间对比损失）。它发布的是预训练视觉编码器权重，可同时提供表征与稠密平滑奖励（到目标图像的嵌入距离），而非新的语言标注语料。
flow_cn: 目标条件价值目标（隐式时间对比）
冻结的 VIP 视觉编码器 + 奖励
下游机器人控制 / 奖励塑形
no_corpus_en: VIP is a reward and representation-learning method, not an annotation source. It trains on unlabeled Ego4D frames (it does not consume narrations) and releases model weights under CC BY-NC 4.0. There are no VIP-original language strings to download or cluster, so this atlas documents it descriptively.
no_corpus_cn: VIP 是一种奖励与表征学习方法，而非标注来源。它在无标注的 Ego4D 帧上训练（不消费旁白），并以 CC BY-NC 4.0 许可发布模型权重。没有 VIP 原创的语言字符串可供下载或聚类，因此本图谱以描述性方式记录它。
example_caption_en: VIP is pretrained on unlabeled Ego4D egocentric video; the project page shows example footage and learned reward curves.
example_caption_cn: VIP 在无标注的 Ego4D 第一人称视频上预训练；项目主页展示了示例片段与学习到的奖励曲线。
provenance: Verified via arXiv 2210.00030 and github.com/facebookresearch/vip (CC BY-NC 4.0); project page sites.google.com/view/vip-rl.
citation: Ma et al., VIP: Towards Universal Visual Reward and Representation via Value-Implicit Pre-Training, ICLR 2023 (arXiv:2210.00030).
